title: 開演！ぷりてぃー★エンジェル 1話 ぷりてぃー★エンジェル

script.text: おはようございまーす！

translations.en: Good morningー!

script.text: ……って、あれ？　優ちゃんが事務所に一番乗り？

translations.en: …Wait‚ huh? Yu-chan is the first to arrive at the office?

script.text: {user}さんとの待ち合わせ時間まで

translations.en: You're so early‚ Yu-chan

script.text: まだだいぶあるのに、早いわね、優

translations.en: It's still a while‚ until our meeting with {user}-san

script.text: そんなにテレビに食いついて、何を観てるの？

translations.en: What are you watching‚ glued to the TV like that?

script.text: ……私の声、聞こえてる？

translations.en: …Can you‚ hear me?

script.text: ……おーい、優ちゃーん。反応がない……。あれ？

translations.en: …Heyー‚ Yu-chan. No reaction…. Huh?

script.text: 優ちゃんが観てるのって、アニメ？　これって……

translations.en: Is that anime that Yu-chan is watching? This is…

script.text: 確か『ぷりてぃー★エンジェル』っていうアニメよね

translations.en: Surely‚ it's called "Pretty★Angel"

script.text: 名前だけなら知ってるわ。私が小さい頃からあったもの

translations.en: I know the name. It's been around since I was a kid

script.text: うわ～懐かしい～！　小学校低学年くらいまで観てたよ

translations.en: Wow‚ I miss it! I watched it until I was in the lower grades of elementary school

script.text: ごっこ遊び、お兄ちゃんに付き合ってもらったな～

translations.en: My older brother would join me in role play

script.text: あ……このエンディングテーマソング、素敵ね

translations.en: Oh… this ending theme song is great

script.text: 聞き心地のいいメロディーと、発声……

translations.en: A pleasant melody and vocals…

script.text: 口ずさみたくなるようなキャッチーなフレーズ

translations.en: A catchphrase that makes you want to hum

script.text: メッセージ性の高い歌詞……どれも良く出来てる

translations.en: Lyrics with a strong message… all of them are well-written

script.text: さっすが瑠依ちゃん！！！

translations.en: Rui‚ I knew it!!!

script.text: きゃっ！

translations.en: Kyaaa!

script.text: 曲の良さに気付けるんは、瑠依ちゃんの耳がええからや

translations.en: The reason Rui can capture the quality of a song so well is because she has a good ear

script.text: でもこの作品の良さはそれだけやない

translations.en: But that's not all that's great about this anime

script.text: 大人の鑑賞にも耐えうるストーリーと演出

translations.en: The story and direction are also enjoyable for adults

script.text: 作り込まれたキャラクター、どれをとっても一級品

translations.en: and well-structed characters‚ everything is top-class

script.text: ただの女児向けアニメやと舐めたらいけません

translations.en: Don't underestimate this as just an anime for girls

script.text: うちも、小さい頃はただ好きで観てただけなんやけど

translations.en: When I was little‚ I just watched it because it was fun‚ but

script.text: 成長するにつれて、セリフの深みも分かってきて

translations.en: when I grew up‚ I realized the deeper meaning in the lines

script.text: 今やうちの人生の教科書と言っても過言ではない

translations.en: Now‚ it's no exaggeration to say that this is the textbook of my life

script.text: ゆ、優ちゃん、凄い早口！

translations.en: Yu-chan‚ you talk so fast!

script.text: も～、気付いてたならもっと早く言ってよ～

translations.en: Well~‚ if you noticed‚ you should have told us sooner~

script.text: あはは、ごめんなぁ。ええところやったから

translations.en: Ahaha‚ I'm sorry. It was a good part‚

script.text: つい見入ってしまってん。はぁ、今週もええ話やったわ

translations.en: so I was watching intently. Sigh‚ this week's episode was good‚ too

script.text: おでんによって深まったメイン戦士三人の絆……

translations.en: The bond between the three main warriors deepened through oden…

script.text: はぁ～……尊い……夕飯はおでんにしましょ……

translations.en: Haa~… so precious… Let's have oden for dinner…

script.text: 優がそこまで評価するのだから、素晴らしい作品なのね

translations.en: If Yu thinks it highly of it‚ it must be a great show

script.text: 子供の頃、ちゃんと観ておけば良かったわ……

translations.en: I wish I had watched it properly when I was a kid…

script.text: 今からでも遅ないよ。毎週録画しとるし、過去作も

translations.en: It's not too late. I record it every week‚ and I also have the previous episodes

script.text: 劇場版も円盤で持っとるから、良かったら一緒に観よ？

translations.en: and the movie on DVD‚ so if you'd like‚ let's watch it together

script.text: 全部！？　さすが優ちゃん、ファンの鑑だね！

translations.en: All of it!? You're truly a model fan‚ Yu-chan!

script.text: ……あの、今度私にも貸してもらえるかなぁ？

translations.en: …Hey‚ could you lend it to me next time?

script.text: そんなにこのアニメを好きだったんだな、優

translations.en: So you loved this anime that much‚ Yu?

script.text: それならちょうど良かった

translations.en: In that case‚ it's perfect

script.text: おはようございます、{user}さん

translations.en: Good morning‚ {user}-san

script.text: ちょうど良かったって、何がですか？

translations.en: What do you mean‚ perfect?

script.text: 実はこの『ぷりてぃー★エンジェル』の舞台化が

translations.en: Actually‚ "Pretty★Angel" has been decided to be adapted into a stage show

script.text: 決定したんだ。いわゆる「2.5次元舞台」だな

translations.en: It called '2.5-dimensional musical'

script.text: 今日来てもらったのは、その出演依頼が届いたからだ

translations.en: The reason you came today is because you received an invitation to appear in it

script.text: 凄いぞ、三人がメインキャストに選ばれてる

translations.en: It's amazing‚ three of you have been chosen as the main cast

script.text: え……え？　……えぇぇぇええ！！？

translations.en: Eh …eh? …Ehhhhh!!?

script.text: うちらが、『ぷりてぃー★エンジェル』の舞台に！？

translations.en: We are on the stage of "Pretty★Angel"!?

script.text: 確かに毎週放送後に、ネットでアニメの感想を見てると

translations.en: Certainly‚ after every week's broadcast‚ when I see reviews of the anime on the internet‚

script.text: 「実写化するならトリエル一択」ってよう見るけど……

translations.en: I often see people saying‚ 'If it were to be made into a live-action version‚ make it TRINITYAiLE'

script.text: こんなん、ファン冥利に尽きるやん！　絶対やるで～！

translations.en: This would be the ultimate fan's dream come true! I'd definitely do it~!

script.text: うちが演じるなら、絶対プカミちゃんや！！

translations.en: If I were to play the role‚ it would definitely be Pukami-chan!!

script.text: （でも、人気のある原作やから、慎重に判断するべきや）

translations.en: （But since it's a popular original work‚ we should make our decision carefully）

script.text: （ファンはよぉ見とるから半端な演技じゃ納得せえへんよ）

translations.en: （Fans watch it carefully‚ so they won't be satisfied with half-hearted acting）

script.text: あの……優ちゃん、もし間違ってたらごめんね

translations.en: Um… Yu-chan‚ sorry if I'm wrong

script.text: 本音と建前が逆になってない？

translations.en: Aren't you getting your true feelings and your public image reversed?

script.text: あ～～、ほんまや。やってもうたわ

translations.en: Oh~~‚ my. I've done it

script.text: でも、どっちも本音やから問題はないけどな！

translations.en: But‚ both sides are true feelings‚ there is no problem!

script.text: あはは……。けど、私もお芝居の仕事、大好きだし

translations.en: Hahaha… But I love acting‚ too

script.text: 子供の頃よく観てたアニメだから、やってみたい！

translations.en: It's an anime I often watched as a child‚ so I'd like to try it!

script.text: 私は……演技の経験がないし、自信がないわ

translations.en: I… I don’t have any acting experience‚ so I’m not confident

script.text: すみれが演技が得意なのは知ってるけど、優は？

translations.en: I know Sumire is good at acting‚ but what about Yu?

script.text: うちは名優、鈴村久美子の娘やで？

translations.en: I'm the daughter of the famous actress‚ Kumiko Suzumura

script.text: 小さい頃は映画やらテレビドラマによう出とったもんや

translations.en: When I was young‚ I often appeared in movies‚ TV shows‚ and dramas

script.text: せやから大丈夫。うちが面倒見たるから

translations.en: So it's okay. I'll take care of you

script.text: 瑠依ちゃんは大船に乗ったつもりで構えとったらええよ

translations.en: Rui‚ you can just assume you're on a roll

script.text: ……優がそう言うなら。足を引っ張るかもしれないけど

translations.en: …If Yu says so. I might hold you back‚ maybe

script.text: 私もやりたい。ううん、二人に負けないように頑張る

translations.en: I want to try it‚ too. No‚ I'll do my best not to lose to you

script.text: 満場一致みたいだな。それじゃ、特に瑠依とすみれは

translations.en: It seems unanimous. So‚ especially Rui and Sumire

script.text: 今のうちに原作をしっかり把握しておいてくれ

translations.en: make sure you understand the original work while you can

script.text: {user}さんの言う通りや

translations.en: {user}-san is right

script.text: さっきは興奮して、言いそびれとったけど

translations.en: I was so excited I forgot to mention it earlier‚ but

script.text: このアニメは長く続いとる、ファンの多いシリーズや

translations.en: this anime is a long-running series‚ with a large fan base

script.text: お芝居の経験がある、すみれちゃんはよう分かるやろ？

translations.en: Sumire has acting experience‚ so you understand it well‚ right?

script.text: 原作モノで、原作をちゃんと理解しとらん役者は

translations.en: It's based on an original work‚ and actors who don't fully understand the original work

script.text: ファンに簡単に見透かされてしまいます

translations.en: will easily to get rejected by fans

script.text: 本番までに、演じるキャラを自分のものにせんと……

translations.en: Until the main stage‚ if you can't make the character you're playing your own…

script.text: 痛い目、見ることになるよ？

translations.en: You will have a painful‚ experience

script.text: さすがはあの鈴村久美子さんの娘さんだ

translations.en: Indeed‚ she is Suzumura Kumiko's daughter

script.text: 今回の仕事は、優に任せて大丈夫そうだな

translations.en: I think‚ it's okay to leave this thing to Yu

script.text: えぇ、任せて下さい。瑠依ちゃんもすみれちゃんも

translations.en: Yes‚ leave it to me. I'll take care of both

script.text: うちがまとめて面倒見ますから

translations.en: Rui and Sumire

script.text: ――数日後

translations.en: ――A few days later

script.text: 二人とも、原作は一通り視聴済みやね？

translations.en: You've both finished the original work‚ right?

script.text: はいっ、優先生！

translations.en: Yes‚ Yu-sensei!

script.text: 今からやるんは、うちらが演じるメインキャラ三人の

translations.en: Now‚ we're going to have a lesson where you can physically experience

script.text: 関係性を、体で感じてもらうレッスンです

translations.en: the relationships‚ between the three main characters we're playing

script.text: えっと……それって、どういうこと？

translations.en: Umm… what does that‚ mean?

script.text: アニメ35話、覚えとる？　三人がクレープ屋さんで

translations.en: Do you remember episode 35 of the anime? There was a scene where three people

script.text: 仲良くクレープを食べさせ合う名シーン、あったやん

translations.en: were happily sharing a crepe at a crepe shop

script.text: 何話かまでは覚えてないけど……いいシーンだったわ

translations.en: I don't remember what they talked about… but it was a good scene

script.text: さすが優。原作を丸暗記してきたという訳ね

translations.en: As expected of Yu. So you've memorized the entire original work

script.text: 趣味で繰り返し観ているからじゃないかな……

translations.en: Maybe it's because she watch it over and over again as a hobby…

script.text: で、ここでどんな練習をするの？　優ちゃん

translations.en: So‚ what kind of practice are we doing here? Yu-chan

script.text: それはな……

translations.en: Well‚ it's…

script.text: クレープの食べさせ合いっこや！！

translations.en: Sharing a crepe!!

script.text: それ、練習！？

translations.en: Is that‚ practice!?

script.text: うちらが演じる三人と同じ行動をするやろ？

translations.en: We'll do the same things as the three characters we're playing‚ right?

script.text: そしたら、キャラとの一体感が強まるやろ？

translations.en: If we do that‚ we'll feel more connected to the character‚ right?

script.text: すると演じるキャラと、キャラ同士の関係を

translations.en: And we can understand the characters we play and the relationships

script.text: より深く理解出来るやろ？

translations.en: between them more deeply‚ right?

script.text: そう。全ては演技のために必要なことなんや……

translations.en: That's right. All of that is necessary for acting…

script.text: （ほ、ほんとかなぁ……？）

translations.en: （R-Really…?）

script.text: なるほど……考えたわね、優

translations.en: I see… You've thought it through‚ Yu

script.text: これが「役に入り込む」……ということなのね？

translations.en: So this is what it means to 'get into character'… right?

script.text: さっすがは瑠依ちゃん。飲み込みが早いなぁ

translations.en: Indeed Rui. You're such a quick learner

script.text: 分かったら、ささ、このクレープをどうぞ。あーん

translations.en: Now‚ go-go‚ have this crepe. Ahhhー

script.text: あ、あーん……

translations.en: Ah‚ ahhhー

script.text: 「……美味い。これが『クレープ』という物なのか」

translations.en: '…It's good. So this is what they call a "crepe"'

script.text: お、さっそくアニメ35話のあのシーンの再現やね

translations.en: Oh‚ we're already recreating that scene from episode 35 of the anime

script.text: ええやん、そしたら今度はうちにあーんしてくれます？

translations.en: That's great‚ then will you ahhhー me next?

script.text: （まさか、瑠依ちゃんにあーんされたいだけじゃ……）

translations.en: （Maybe‚ you just want to get an "Ahhhー" from Rui-chan…）

script.text: （い、いやいや、優ちゃんに限ってそんな訳……ないよね）

translations.en: （No‚ no-no‚ that can't be Yu… right?）

script.text: ほらほら、すみれちゃんも何見てるん？

translations.en: Hey‚ hey‚ Sumire‚ what are you looking at?

script.text: 瑠依ちゃんみたいにうちにあーんして？

translations.en: Ahhhー me like Louis

script.text: は、は～い。……あーん……！？

translations.en: Yes‚ yes. …Ahhhー…!?
